sourcesContent:
// src/data/fontSites.js
// Add, remove, or edit entries here to manage the repository.

export const CATEGORIES = [
  { id: "all",        label: "All",              icon: "bi-grid-fill" },
  { id: "serif",      label: "Serif",            icon: "bi-type" },
  { id: "sans-serif", label: "Sans-serif",       icon: "bi-fonts" },
  { id: "display",    label: "Display",          icon: "bi-stars" },
  { id: "script",     label: "Script / Handwriting", icon: "bi-pen" },
  { id: "monospace",  label: "Monospace",        icon: "bi-code-slash" },
  { id: "variable",   label: "Variable Fonts",   icon: "bi-sliders" },
];

export const PRICING_TYPES = ["Free", "Paid", "Free + Paid"];

export const FONT_SITES = [
  // ── SERIF ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "Google Fonts",

    category: "serif",

  {

    featured: false,
  },
  {
    id: 5,

    category: "serif",
    pricing: "Paid",
    description: "One-time licensing with no annual renewals. Excellent for long-term brand projects that need licensing stability.",
    tags: ["one-time license", "commercial", "brand"],
    featured: false,
  },

  // ── SANS-SERIF ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  {
    id: 6,

    pricing: "Free",
    description: "Wide range of geometric, humanist, and grotesque sans-serif fonts. All open-source and ready for web embedding.",
    tags: ["open-source", "web", "geometric", "humanist"],
    featured: true,

  {
    id: 7,

    category: "sans-serif",

    featured: true,
  },
  {
    id: 8,

    category: "sans-serif",

    tags: ["Swiss", "branding", "premium", "editorial"],

  },
  {

  {

    tags: ["premium", "lettering", "curated", "professional"],

  {
    id: 19,

  {

  {

  // ── VARIABLE FONTS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  {

    tags: ["playground", "interactive", "demo", "axes"],
